creator: root@aldan.ziplink.net
text:
The libc.so.2.2 is missing one symbol (damn! I fixed without
	writing the name of the symbol down! Well, I can unroll the change
	if neccessary). The older libc.so.2.2 (from my other machine) has
	it, even though it is of the same size.

Fix: 

Copy the file from the older distribution. If you are lucky enough
	to have it...
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install the new snapshot. Try to run tcsh or elm (or whatever)
	built for 2.1
